issues.description: Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but effect text describes placing cards FROM trash (retrieving from trash), not discarding to trash. Should use 'SearchDeck' or similar retrieve action.
Filter references 'subType' but effect specifies cards with type including 'CP'. Filtering should target card type, not subType. Also, cards are being selected FROM trash, not hand.
Missing quantifier for 'up to 2 cards' - action does not specify selecting/placing exactly 2 cards from trash as required by text.

Conditional action structure is incorrect. The K.O. effect should be optional (You may) and dependent on successfully placing 2 cards, but current nesting does not properly model 'You may place 2... : K.O. up to 1'.
Missing 'optional: true' flag - effect text begins with 'You may' indicating this entire effect is optional.
